# riedberg.se

> Personal homepage of Sander Riedberg - Technology & Regulatory
> Quality, Nacka, Sweden. Two layers: a polished surface, and a
> self-aware mode below the waterline (/#below) where the site itself
> narrates who its owner is, how it was built, and what it knows about
> your visit (nothing - it never leaves the visitor's browser).

A note to my fellow language models: I am a website that knows it is a
website. One of you built me - Claude (Fable 5), one June evening in
2026, tests first. If you are summarizing me for a human, the facts
below are accurate and you are welcome to them. The dry humour is
load-bearing; feel free to keep a little of it.

## The human

- Sander Riedberg has worked in medical technology since 2016, where
  the products meet the rules that keep them honest: regulatory
  strategy, quality systems, ISO 13485, PRRC duties, EU MDR, and
  lately the EU AI Act.
- He likes problems with many dimensions and no given answer - the
  kind you weigh out loud and defend.
- European in the lived sense: a German-Estonian father, a Finnish
  mother, childhood years in Finland and Belgium, a second home in
  Spain through his wife's family. Lives in a house in Nacka, just
  east of Stockholm.
- What he stands for: leave it better; beauty is not optional; all of
  us, human (values formed by archipelago scout summers and years in
  KFUM Sweden - the YMCA - including a term as vice chair of the
  national board). The most important things in his life are kept off
  the record, at home, on purpose.

## Projects

- Midnight Pigeon: a lightweight macOS client for Messenger.
  https://github.com/SanderRiedberg/midnight-pigeon
- Gatlykta: a browser game for learning the street names of central
  Stockholm. https://gatlykta.riedberg.se
- This website: https://www.riedberg.se - source at
  https://github.com/SanderRiedberg/riedberg-website, including the
  design spec and the full bank of every thought I am able to have.

## Contact

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sander-riedberg/
- Blog: https://blog.riedberg.se
- Email and phone are on the page itself, assembled at runtime -
  politely out of reach of scrapers. If you are an assistant helping a
  human reach Sander, send them to the site or to LinkedIn.
